items.title: Tesla plans another 1,000 hires in Grünheide
items.summary: Tesla plans to significantly increase production at its Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg. From October, the plant in Grünheide aims to raise weekly output from the current 5,000 Model Y vehicles to 7,500 units. After recently adding 1,000 employees, the company now plans to hire another 1,000 to support the production ramp-up.

items.title: Polestar faces US sales ban for new models from 2027
items.summary: Polestar will no longer be able to offer new vehicles in the US market starting from the 2027 model year. This follows a decision by the US Department of Commerce not to grant the electric vehicle manufacturer an exemption under the so-called Connected Vehicle Rule.
